programme.title: Poldark

programme.title: Poldark

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: As the tide rises in New Zealand's Northland Harbours, Stingrays and Eagle rays swim in to feast on shellfish. But they are not the top of the food chain. Only in New Zealand, and only in these harbours do Orca hunt rays. Trapped in the shallows, the rays breach the surface and swim for their lives, as the Orca pursue – with a highly evolved practice for avoiding the rays' stinging tail. As the tide ebbs, the once underwater world of Northland's mangroves surfaces and seethes. Twisted roots that moments ago sheltered fish are now exposed - a seafood platter for patient Herons, Spoonbills, and Shags.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: Just north of New Zealand's biggest city, tens of thousands of fish school meters from the beach in one of the world's first marine reserves. Inside the Goat Island Reserve giant snapper can live for eighty years and crayfish grow to weigh 8 kilos. Both feed on the thousands of sea urchins that graze the kelp forest, maintaining a delicately balanced ecosystem. Like many of the reserve's inhabitants, they entrust their larvae to the ocean currents - so how do they find their way back to the reef when they take on their adult form and settle down?

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: Steve digs back into his Montana roots to build his cowboy buddy J.R. the ultimate ranch truck by Frankensteining together a pair of vintage Dodges.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Frank (Peter Mullan) is a hard-working 55 year-old, respected in his local community, who suddenly finds himself without a job. For the first time in his life, Frank is without direction. When his friend Danny (Billy Boyd) jokes that on a clear day he could swim to France, an idea is planted in Frank\?€?s mind. Concealing his plans from his loving wife Joan (Brenda Blethyn) Frank determines to put his life back together by attempting the ultimate test of endurance ?€? to swim the English Channel. In doing so he cements a broken relationship with his grown-up son.

programme.desc: Pressured to not look “like a dad” for an upcoming work event, James takes his kids out on a shopping trip. Seán Cullen guest stars.

programme.title: Boy Joins Cheerleading For A Girl
programme.desc: Jay, a basketball captain, joins the cheer team to win over Madison, the cheer captain. Despite his efforts, he's benched for a basketball game. After a surprising twist in both sports, Jay confronts Madison, only to face another heartbreak.

programme.title: Kid Rigs Raffle To Win
programme.desc: Mikey, a mischievous teen, cheats in a Tesla raffle to win a car for Noah's struggling dad. His elaborate schemes unravel when his mom exposes his dishonesty, leading to a surprising twist where Noah wins, and Mikey loses his coveted Christmas gift.

programme.title: Girl Embraces Her Unibrow
programme.desc: An awkward, sweaty teen, Talia, is bullied by popular Hannah but finds allies in kindhearted Jared and confident Trevor. A dramatic makeover and a truth-revealing audio clip expose Hannah, empowering Talia and her new friends to embrace their authentic selves.

programme.title: Dad Disowns His Daughter
programme.desc: Brynn, a talented basketball player, struggles for her dad's approval, who favors her brother. After her dad reveals a heartbreaking secret, Brynn finds a mentor in her teacher, who helps her pursue basketball, leading her to professional success and a chance to prove her worth.

programme.title: Girl Denies Nerd In Front Of School
programme.desc: Arrogant Raji snubs Mario, her secret admirer, for popular Davis. After a disastrous Valentine's date exposes Davis's true colors and leaves her with a huge bill, Raji learns humility and accepts Mario's kindness.

programme.title: Billionaire Falls In Love With Poor Boy
programme.desc: A shallow rich girl, Gemma, fakes a relationship with nerdy Jordan to escape her controlling boyfriend. But when her lie is exposed, she realizes Jordan's genuine kindness and chooses love over money.

programme.title: Nice Guy With Broken Heart
programme.desc: After a breakup, Dallas becomes a player, juggling multiple dates. His schemes unravel when an exposé goes viral, costing him a second chance with his ex and leaving him single and humiliated.

programme.title: Kid Won't Listen To His Mother
programme.desc: Jay avoids his mother's rules, leading her to use reverse psychology. He overhears the plan but falls for a real kidnapper. He then uses reverse psychology to escape and is saved by police, but doesn't change.

programme.title: Mom Shuts Down Kids' Video Games
programme.desc: Worried about screen time, Kathy confiscates her kids' devices. Her son, Ethan, strikes a deal: if he wins a Minecraft tournament, he gets them back. He wins, sparking a career. Years later, the kids—now successful game developers—repay their parents by paying off their mortgage.

programme.title: Kid Won't Go To Sleep At Night
programme.desc: Teen Jay, refusing to follow his bedtime rules, pulls an all-nighter, only to ruin his important audition. Humiliated and exhausted, he finally learns to appreciate his mother's rules and the importance of rest.

programme.title: Kids Cheat Mrbeast For $1 Million
programme.desc: Dhar Mann challenges fans to meet MrBeast for $1M. Mikey and Jay cheat through the games but get busted, leaving honest Derek to win. The sore losers go out with a bang, ruining the finale by pieing MrBeast and Jay Shetty in front of everyone.

programme.title: Kid Changes His Grades By Hacking
programme.desc: Hacker Ted changes his grades to A's for money. The plan backfires when he's forced into an Academic Bowl and exposes his own ignorance. To avoid expulsion, he must fix the security system, ultimately losing his cash to the angry students he scammed.

programme.title: Spoiled Girl Survives The Word'd Strictest School
programme.desc: Wealthy, spoiled Selena, grieving her mother, sabotages her father's engagement by making her life miserable at boarding school. She discovers her late mother's history there and, guided by the school's ethos, transforms her outlook, finding peace and genuine connection.

programme.title: Teacher Gets Revenge on School Bully
programme.desc: Cocky teen coder Kyle is forced to become a teacher for a week after insulting his instructors. He quickly learns teaching is harder than it looks, causing a fire in science and a code disaster until his computer teacher saves the day, proving his arrogance wrong.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E1
programme.desc: When Jerry is booked to appear on "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno," he takes George with him to Los Angeles to search for Kramer -- who vanished in a huff months earlier only to pop up inexplicably on TV in an episode of "Murphy Brown." George and Jerry are unaware that their wayward friend is in trouble as a victim of mistaken identity. Meanwhile, George bothers every celebrity he encounters.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E6
programme.desc: When Jerry's mom and dad come for a visit, Jerry desperately tries to buy back the watch the bought for him, which was recovered by his Uncle Leo after Jerry had thrown it in the trash. Across town, a sweaty-palmed George tracks down a TV executive to negotiate his series deal -- at a lower figure.

programme.title: Seinfeld S4E7
programme.desc: Jerry agrees to make a side trip to visit a sickly fan -- who must live in a protective plastic tent -- while he and George drive up to a mountain cabin with their dates. But complications set in when Jerry gets lost while driving with Elaine, and a cigar-puffing Kramer makes an unwanted visit from out of the blue.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This episode of Minutes With features Manchester-born rapper Bugzy Malone, who was recruited into the notorious Little Hill Gang as a teenager. Bugzy tells us about his childhood growing up in the shadow of Manchester's gang wars, how he suffered abuse at the hands of his stepfather and the disturbing moment he was stabbed with a screwdriver as an 11-year-old boy. Bugzy reveals how the death of his best friend led him to write music from the heart and create a 'blueprint' for young people.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this weeks episode of Minutes With we sat down with Mirsad Solakovic, a Bosnian refugee who was forced to flee to the UK with his family. Mirsad tells us about the torture he suffered at the hands of his Serbian school teacher, the time he spent in a concentration camp and how this gave him PTSD.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Professor Patricia Wiltshire's research into pollen and plants has helped convict some of the UK's most notorious killers. Here, she tells us about the cases that have stayed with her during her 30-year career, and the one that brought her to tears.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Mandy Smith, former cabin crew for Virgin Atlantic, and author of Cabin Fever: The Sizzling Secrets of a Virgin Air Hostess, answers your questions on airline food, the infamous 'mile high club', and whether turbulence is dangerous.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we talk to Kieran Proverbs-Brown, who became a gang member at 14 and was in prison at 18 for attempted murder. When he got out at 30, he made a firm decision to turn his life around.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Dr Sohom Das works with individuals who have committed violent crimes and are suspected of having mental illnesses. In this episode, he discusses shocking cases, why people are obsessed with true crime, and how to spot a psychopath.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.9
programme.desc: Song Ah and Joon Young finally realize they have mutual feelings for one another, and they have a few blissful moments together. Meanwhile, Hyeon Ho finds out about Joon Young and Song Ah's relationship and gets angry. The stress caused by his broken friendship and the seemingly perpetual cycle of preparing for competitions starts to wear on Joon Young.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.10
programme.desc: Seong Jae suggests that Joon Young talks about his family on TV for publicity. Joon Young feels both insulted and ashamed, but he holds his ground. Meanwhile, Song Ah asks Joon Young if she can visit his place. She keeps feeling Jun Kyung's presence around Joon Young both at his apartment and later on at school.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.11
programme.desc: Seong Jae finds out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and calls her for a chat. His bluntness hurts her feelings. Later on, Joon Young joins Song Ah on a sudden trip to Daejeon and shows her around the neighborhood where he grew up. After an unexpected meeting with his mother, Joon Young opens up to Song Ah about more personal matters.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.12
programme.desc: Song Ah has to look for a new accompanist when her last one quits. She asks her acquaintances for help, but she has no luck. Just then, Joon Young offers to play for her. People find out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and that Joon Young is playing for Song Ah's grad school exam. Rumors about them spread like wildfire, which makes Song Ah doubt if she made the right decision. Meanwhile, Joon Young looks for paid work performing at a concert.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.13
programme.desc: With Jung Kyung constantly asking Joon Young whether he still has feelings for her, Joon Young once again tells her how he feels. Later, Song Ah questions Joon Young about his whereabouts last night after seeing him and Jung Kyung ride off in a taxi. When Director Nah asks Joon Young a favor regarding Jung Kyung, he turns down her request. Meanwhile, Song Ah is going through a hard time herself and makes a decision that should've been made a long time ago.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.14
programme.desc: The recording of Yoo Tae Jin playing "Traumerei" goes viral. However, it turns out that Joon Young performed the music, not Tae Jin. He demands Tae Jin take the recording down, but he refuses. Jung Kyung helps Joon Young by successfully convincing Tae Jin to take the recording down. Song Ah runs into Jung Kyung and hears about the recording and how much it means to Joon Young. In the end, she decides to break up with Joon Young.

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.2
programme.desc: Just before his death, Yoon-beom suddenly visits Joo-ran's house and mentions a late-night fishing trip with Jae-ho. Later, Sang-eun discovers that Yoon-beom had been drowning in debt. Meanwhile, Joo-ran eventually finds a severed finger buried in her backyard…

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.3
programme.desc: At Yoon-beom's funeral, Sang-eun shocks Joo-ran by saying, “Your husband killed mine.” From then on, Joo-ran begins to notice suspicious traces of Jae-ho's hidden life. Sang-eun, meanwhile, finds a secret phone Yoon-beom had hidden, which contains a photo of Jae-ho with a young girl. She begins scheming to blackmail Jae-ho for money.

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.4
programme.desc: Joo-ran visits Sang-eun and proposes they work together to uncover the truth about Jae-ho. Meanwhile, Sang-eun receives a call from Jae-ho. Watching their secret meeting from afar, Joo-ran becomes even more conflicted, unsure whether to trust Sang-eun or her own husband…

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.5
programme.desc: The culprit behind Yoon-beom's death is finally revealed! As Joo-ran spends more time with Sang-eun, she begins to see a different, darker side of Jae-ho. Still, she resolves to protect her family. But soon, she discovers that another terrifying secret has been buried within her home…!

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.6
programme.desc: Through Seung-jae's confession, Joo-ran finally learns the truth behind the strange smell and sounds she had sensed, as well as Jae-ho's dark secret. Everything she has built is now on the verge of collapse. Meanwhile, Sang-eun uncovers a shocking secret hidden in Joo-ran's house through Yoon-beom's phone, which she received from the police…

programme.title: LIES HIDDEN IN MY GARDEN (Dubbed) Ep.7
programme.desc: Holding Joo-ran's family secrets as leverage, Sang-eun confronts her and begins to blackmail her. Surprisingly, Joo-ran hands over 200 million won without hesitation and makes Sang-eun an unexpected proposal…

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. We investigate mass UFO sightings, personal abductions, government cover-ups and breaking alien news from around the world. We delve into the "photoshopping" of space, the value of Wikileaks, and the role social media plays in alien stories.

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: World's Rarest
programme.desc: The world is facing an urgent biodiversity crisis. Untold numbers of animals are at risk of being lost forever, with many species racing towards extinction. In this show, we try to highlight some of these incredible creatures, from the plucky pangolins to the critically endangered rhinoceroses, who live in constant fear of the poacher's bullet. Films provide a record of Earth's wonderful wildlife, but this is hopefully not an archive of what's lost, but evidence of what we should be preserving.

programme.title: Rivers Lifeblood
programme.desc: Rivers flow like veins across the Earth, a lifeline to countless ecosystems. Since the dawn of time they've fuelled the development of animal and human life alike. Habitats in constant flux, they change with the seasons, gradually transforming over time. As we run the river's course, we meet the spectacular animals who depend on it. These waterways are as much as lifeblood to this wildlife as they are to us. They deserve our respect and protection – they're our lifeblood and we must keep them flowing.

programme.title: Glorious Grasslands
programme.desc: Savanna, prairie, meadow: grassland goes by many names. Seas of green, dominated by one of the most successful plant species. It's so hardy and productive that it can survive flooding, drought and fires, managing to feed vast animal communities. What's more, it's not just a food source, it's also a theatre many of nature's most dramatic spectacles play out in this breathtaking wilderness. We literally need grasslands to breathe, but they're a vital resource for some of our most exciting wildlife!

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Project Antarctica
programme.desc: Why don't you do something sensible? - Tim, Michael and Dennis have heard this sentence more than once since their school days when they professed their dream jobs: Artist, photographer, filmmaker. And they went on to say that some dreams had to remain dreams, that work didn't have to be fun, but above all that it had to pay enough and be safe. A few years later, the three are working on their joint feature film. They put all their eggs in one basket and are determined to invest two years of working time to achieve their goal. Unpaid. It's not just any goal: the three want to travel to Antarctica. They want to find out whether it is possible to reach even the most distant destinations if you only want to. With ten boxes full of equipment, they set off on the 14,000 km journey to Antarctica. And thus on the journey of a lifetime...

programme.title: Countries People Adventures
programme.desc: In southeastern Iceland, Europe's largest glacier, the gigantic Vatnajökull, covers an area of around 9,000 square kilometers. Beneath it lie the world's most active and dangerous volcanoes. This extreme landscape is as dangerous as it is fascinating: glistening white glacier tongues, lagoons covered with icebergs, bizarre green lava mountains, snow-covered volcanic cones, solidified lava flows and imposing waterfalls overwhelm everyone who gets to see them. In 2008, Icelanders declared the glacier and adjacent areas a national park, the largest in Europe. In this documentary, the team meets people who live, work or do research here: a life with the dangers of fire and ice in the overwhelming landscape of Vatnajökull National Park.

programme.title: Europe's far North
programme.desc: Lofoten is the rugged archipelago in the Norwegian Arctic Ocean. Whoever arrives here is really at the end. Moskenes is the end of the line, and anyone who wants to go further needs a boat or a plane. The only way to get to the open sea is via the Maelstrom, which is quite dangerous. On the outermost headland, there are only a few ruins left. The last inhabitants are long gone, a supply was hardly possible. But fishermen are on the way, mainly to catch cod. And there is the coastal administration, which takes care of broken sea marks and lighthouses. A visit to one of the luxurious ships of the Hurtig Line is not to be missed. They shuttle off rough coasts on an eleven-day trip between the Russian border and southern Norway. A floating workplace for a wide variety of professions. The island of Andøya is not served by the Hurtiglinie. It lies too far out in the Atlantic. One of the most important observatories in Europe is located here. A young woman, Sandra Blindheim, is the boss. She is responsible for the large laser that delivers important information to scientists around the world. On clear winter nights, there is a wonderful panoramic view of the aurora borealis.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The white wilderness in Greenland's East
programme.desc: Fjords, glaciers and the highest mountains in the Arctic: East Greenland with its spectacular nature is one of the most sparsely populated regions on earth. The people here live in extreme isolation and depend on helicopter flights for their supplies. Despite harsh conditions, the inhabitants here lovingly maintain their traditions and enjoy their outdoor leisure time even at minus 20 degrees Celsius. The town of Tasiilaq is the "metropolis" with 4,000 inhabitants and offers a very special attraction: the only ski lift on the east coast. Thomas Mikaelsen, the lift attendant, is not to be envied for his job. The only 100 meter long lift comes from Switzerland and is already 20 years old. If Thomas gets the drag lift running at all, it often only lasts for an hour. Then the ski crazy's luck depends on his repair skills. The lift is the only frosty open-air pleasure. For Salo Kunuk his sled dogs are both pleasure and work. He is currently teaching his daughter Karla how to steer a dog sled, private driving lessons from her father, so to speak. Karla will need it, because in the eternal ice the sled is the only means of transportation.

programme.title: Antarctica
programme.sub-title: Tales from the End of the World
programme.desc: The Antarctic region is undoubtedly one of the most remote and inhospitable, yet one of the most beautiful landscapes of the world. This documentary takes us on a journey to the stormy isolated islands of the Southern Ocean. Seals, penguins, seabirds and numerous other animals live and breed in this hostile environment and harsh climate. Only by an icebreaker can we reach the remote coasts of the Antarctic continent where Emperor Penguins defy the life-threatening environment of the vast ice desert at the end of the world.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.sub-title: The Journey of the Snowy Owls
programme.desc: Snowy owls live a life full of mystery up in the Arctic. Thousands of years ago, they built a community of fate with their neighbors – lemmings. About every four years, lemmings proliferate in huge numbers. This way, snowy owls have enough feed for their young. The owls lay up to eleven eggs and can successfully raise the chicks – each of them needs two to four lemmings per day. Lately, however, lemmings' mass reproduction hasn't been as regular in some parts of the Tundra. What will happen to them and the snowy owls? What is the ecological link here? And what will happen if one year the winter arrives way too early? The best way for many birds to adapt to the winter is to flee to the South. But lemmings can't migrate and have to endure temperatures as low as -40°C. Meanwhile, if the winter is too cold and the snow level too high, even the perfectly adapted owls have to migrate in order to survive. A fascinating journey from the Arctic to Central Europe begins. Following the owls on this uncommon path, the viewer learns how animals adapt to the inhospitable climate conditions, what ecological restraints bear down on the northern fauna and which fantastic survival strategies the animals can develop. This unique documentary tells a fascinating and breathtaking story: as in a fairy tale, the snowy owls leave us a message from the changing Arctic.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Gigantic fjords and over 5,000 small islands: In Alaska's south there's a lot of wilderness and little civilization. The region between the capital Juneau and the Canadian border is also known by locals as the "Last Frontier", the last outpost. Michelle Masden, for example, has come to terms with the harsh conditions here. She is the only seaplane pilot in the region. She earns her living with her 65-year-old Beaver: as an air taxi, transport plane and now and then as a rescuer in last necessity. Michelle flies anything and everything: spare parts and food, doctors, hikers and hunters. For the fishermen of southern Alaska she searches for large shoals of fish and guides the captains to the next good catch. Ray Rusaw was a car mechanic by profession, but in his old age he was gripped by gold fever. With a self-built special raft and a highly creative selection of equipment from the DIY store, he sets off in search of the precious metal that his predecessors overlooked two centuries ago. For four years he has been happily obsessively combing through sandbanks and river courses. For Ray, the search for gold has little to do with luck and much to do with meticulous research. He is certain that he has found the perfect spot.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. Who reigns supreme in the wild? Discover the untold stories of nature's fiercest competitors and most fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas uncovers the revolutionary spirit woven into the music of St. Croix, where sound has long served as a rallying cry for justice and identity. Through the powerful perspectives of Mada Nile, Ras Attitude, Ras Bach, the Ay-Ay Cultural Dancers, and Kevin Williams, this episode explores how artists have used music to confront oppression, celebrate resilience, and inspire change — from the island's historic struggles to its modern-day movements.

programme.title: Iceland
programme.desc: Majestic volcanoes, seething geysers, raging waterfalls, threatening fjords, mighty glaciers, endless lava fields – there is hardly another country in the world that offers as much impressive nature as Iceland, the remote island in the harsh North Sea. The nature in Iceland is immense! Here, the four elements of nature can be experienced as raw and as close-up as practically no other place on Earth. And nowhere on the northern hemisphere can the origin of life, can growth and decay be experienced as dramatically as here. Besides the impressive nature, we get to know the dramatic history of the Viking culture with its nature-influenced mythology and discuss the negative effects of excessive tourism.

programme.title: Iceland
programme.desc: This documentary is a scenic expedition through majestic volcanoes, seething geysers, powerful waterfalls, threatening fjords and almighty glaciers. Hardly any other country offers such a variety of spectacular forces of nature! We will give you an insight on how it can be that the people of a small, distant island with only a fraction of sunlight in some months are happier than the people in more sun-blessed countries.

programme.title: Highway to the Arctic
programme.desc: Every winter, ice roads are built across hundreds of miles in Canada's far north, connecting frozen rivers and lakes, and stretching up to the very northern tip of the country by the Arctic Ocean.

programme.title: Grønland
programme.desc: Greenland is the largest island in the world and the landmass closest to the North Pole. 80% of the country is covered by a layer of ice up to 3000 meters thick. Most of the inhabitants of the country are spread over the breathtaking landscape of the ice-free west coast. The country is mostly inhabited by Inuit, who have been feeding on what nature has provided them for thousands of years. But the original life is in a state of change. The modernisation of society and man-made global warming threaten the Arctic natural paradise that is so incredibly important for our planet. Through the eyes of locals we get to know the authentic Greenland

programme.title: JAEHYUN The 1st Album 「J」
programme.desc: 6. Easy 4. Dandelion 3. Flamin' Hot Lemon 7. Can't Get You With his smooth and gentle voice, Jaehyun brings a unique color to NCT's music. 「J」 is his very first solo album, where he took part in writing, composing, and shaping the overall direction, including the album title. Just as he often marks his belongings with the initial “J,” this album also reflects what is most true to him, which is why he named it 「J」. 8. Smoke (English Ver.)5. Completely 2. Roses 1. Smoke [Track List]

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression. 'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: A Truth Born of Fragility
programme.desc: A whirlwind of sincerity that an indifferent voice cannot hide. Listen to the most honest confessions delivered by a fragile heart. Between collapsing boundaries and bursting revelations, you will encounter the moment when suppressed emotions finally find their truth.

programme.title: Blurry Moment
programme.desc: A moment when all noise fades and your vision blurs. Submerge yourself in surreal landscapes and calm beats. A mood filled only with your own breath, as light as a state of zero gravity.

programme.title: A Warmth That Melts Your Heart
programme.desc: Take a moment to breathe and fill your heart with the warm, comforting voices of Girls' Generation that gently embrace your weary days.

programme.title: Daily Medicine
programme.desc: Scenes from somewhere between vivid reality and hazy imagination, envisioned amidst a monotonous routine. Stay within the flow of these diverse sequences and beats.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. programme.title: Camp Lakebottom

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped

programme.title: The Grim Escape

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
